description: Detailed restaurant reviews with ratings, dish names, prices, and scored opinions presented as an accessible dining guide for followers.
structural_recipe: Feature a specific restaurant or dining location with: (1) Restaurant name and location/navigation details, (2) Multiple dish names with prices in SAR, (3) Personal rating for each dish (X from 10 scale), (4) Brief descriptive commentary, (5) Optional photographer credit. Structure as carousel or numbered list for clarity. Use Arabic for authenticity and accessibility to local audience.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value trusted local recommendations and detailed value assessment (price-to-quality). The transparent 10-point scoring system builds credibility and helps followers make dining decisions. Combining cultural dining destinations (Diriyah nights) with casual restaurant reviews creates relatable, actionable content that drives saves and shares.
transplantation_caveats: Price transparency in SAR is culturally specific—adapt currency and pricing context for other markets
References to specific Saudi locations (Diriyah, Exit 5, Tala Mall) require local knowledge to replicate authentically
Arabic language and cultural dining context may not translate directly to non-Arab audiences
cultural_constraints: Content should respect halal dining standards and Islamic values
Alcohol references must be omitted or implicit
Premium/luxury dining positioning aligns with Saudi aspirational consumption patterns
